recordRampTransaction(address,bytes32,bo.details: NO CUSTODY - this is purely for record-keeping and trust scoring.      The actual fiat↔crypto exchange happened entirely on the provider's      platform. User sent fiat to provider, provider sent crypto to user's      wallet (or vice versa). VFIDE never touched anything.

params.isOnRamp: True if fiat→crypto, false if crypto→fiat

recordRampTransaction(address,bytes32,bo.notice: Provider records a completed ramp transaction

registerProvider(address,string,string,s.notice: Register a licensed fiat ramp provider
